purpose: Defines safe intake policy for Drishvara user submissions, feedback, and palmistry requests before live Supabase write is enabled.
required_before_live_enablement: RLS tested with authenticated test user
palm image private storage policy ready before file upload
guardrails: Do not write submissions to Supabase from public client until auth and RLS are tested.
Do not enable anonymous public inserts.
Do not upload palm images until private storage and explicit consent are implemented.
Do not publish or use submitted personal stories without explicit permission.
Do not expose email, phone, location, or personal identifiers publicly.
All backend submissions must default to pending review.
